title: sphaeropteris runensis
intro: Sphaeropteris runensis, also known as the Runes fern, is a species of fern in the family Marattiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Runes fern is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, including bronchitis and asthma. It is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
